results.text: Loki's Trick: A minor illusion appears to deceive or distract enemies.
Hel's Gift: Half damage next time you are hit.
Jörmungandr's Blessing: Next attack deals additional d4 poison damage.
Nidhogg's Whisper: Advantage on your next Wits Test.
Fenrir's Might: +2 to your next Might Test.
Surtr's Flame: Next attack deals additional d6 fire damage.
Loki's Luck: Reroll the next failed Test.
Hel's Breath: Advantage on your next attack.
Jörmungandr's Coil: Next Swift Test is an automatic success.
Nidhogg's Hoard: Find d10x10 Trinkets or a random Rune nearby.
Fenrir's Roar: Enemies intimidated; DR to hit them becomes 10.
Surtr's Trial: Restore d8 HP, but suffer d4 fire damage in the process.
Loki's Trickery: Your next successful Test must be rerolled.
Hel's Chill: Next time you heal, the amount is halved.
Jörmungandr's Venom: Suffer d4 damage and become poisoned.
Nidhogg's Rot: Your next rest restores 0 HP.
Fenrir's Bite: Disadvantage on your next Swift Test.
Surtr's Scorn: Armour heats up; suffer d4 fire damage.
Loki's Curse: Your next critical hit turns into a failure.
Hel's Gaze: Disadvantage on your next Wits Test.
Jörmungandr's Coil: Disadvantage on your next Swift Test.
Nidhogg's Hunger: Lose d4 rations of food and water.
Fenrir's Fury: Compelled to flee the current situation.
Surtr's Flame: Disadvantage on all Tests for the next hour.

name: BERSERKR.Tables.LokiModerateFavour
description: Entropic power granted by the Trickster.

results.text: Hel's Dark Blessing: A Bone Collector aids you in the next battle.
Jörmungandr's Strike: Next attack adds additional d8 poison damage.
Nidhogg's Gift: GM reveals when the next battle might happen.
Fenrir's Hunt: +2 to Swift Tests for the next d4 hours.
Surtr's Ember: Weapon deals +d6 fire dmg for d6 rounds.
Loki's Trickery: Magic disguise as anyone/anything for d8 hours.
Hel's Armour: +2 to defence in the next battle.
Jörmungandr's Wisdom: Next attack against you misses automatically.
Nidhogg's Feast: Next battle, all enemy non-magical weapons disintegrate.
Fenrir's Rage: Next melee attack deals double damage.
Surtr's Fury: Immune to fire damage in the next battle.
Loki's Gallop: Loki charms enemies; attacks against them have advantage.
Loki's Chaotic Gaze: Next attack inadvertently hits an ally.
Hel's Deadly Omen: Stunned in the first round of next battle.
Jörmungandr's Constriction: Terramoto! Test Swift DR14 or fall prone.
Nidhogg's Gnawing: Armour degraded by 1 tier.
Fenrir's Relentless Hunt: Test Fortitude DR16 or take 2d4 dmg and become Fatigued.
Surtr's Lava Torrent: Test Swift DR14 or suffer 2d6 fire damage.
Loki's False Hope: Next time you heal, you take that damage instead.
Hel's Soul Debt: Sacrifice d6 HP permanent or group takes d10 damage.
Jörmungandr's Poisoned Breath: Test Fortitude DR14 or become poisoned.
Nidhogg's Devouring Shadows: Blindness for d8 hours.
Fenrir's Howling Madness: Test Wits DR14 or compelled to retreat to your home realm.
Surtr's Flaming Sword: Most valuable item reduced to ashes.

name: BERSERKR.Tables.LokiSevereFavour
description: Total entropic chaos in your favour.

results.text: Loki Herself: Attacks/Defences succeed automatically for d4 rounds.
Hel's Army: d4 Modgudr's Sentinels join you in next battle.
Jörmungandr's Fury: Earthquake! All enemies fall prone and take 2d6 damage.
Nidhogg's Descent: Acid rain deals 3d6 damage to enemies and degrades armour.
Fenrir's Pack: d6 Wargr join you in the next battle.
Surtr's Scorched Earth: Enemies take d8 fire dmg every round for d4 rounds.
Loki's Illusions: Advantage on all defences during next battle.
Hel's Vengeance: Enemies take d10 damage and cannot heal for d6 rounds.
Jörmungandr's Bite: Next successful attack deals additional 3d6 poison damage.
Nidhogg's Hunger: Triple Trinkets and gain d6 Runes after next battle.
Fenrir's Blessing: Next success is a triple damage critical.
Surtr's Inferno: Immune to fire; deal additional d8 fire damage permanently.
Loki's Curse of Chaos: Your next critical becomes a fumble.
Hel's Grasp: Half current HP drained instantly.
Nidhogg's Rot: Group loses d6 HP; no healing for d6 hours.
Jörmungandr's Venom: All party members become poisoned.
Fenrir's Mauling: Test Fortitude DR16 or lose most valuable item and a Saga tale.
Surtr's Inferno: Group takes 4d6 fire damage; wood/cloth items destroyed.
Hel's Arrival: Ruler of the underworld arrives to execute judgement.
Jörmungandr's Arrival: The World Serpent emerges to challenge you.
Fenrir's Arrival: The Great Wolf arrives hungry for vengeance.
Surtr's Arrival: Fire giant arrives to raze the world with his flame sword.
Nidhogg's Arrival: Root-devourer arrives to consume your life force.
Loki Herself: The Trickster arrives personally to weave chaos.
